lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me why you're here?

lines.speaker: Hiylik Myna
lines.text: Of course. I plan to assist the forces of Saradomin who will come to our aid, and fight against the legions of vampyres that infest this foul place. These brave mercenaries shall need a guide.

lines.speaker: Hiylik Myna
lines.text: When a guide arrives, I will aid the mercenary by holding their wealth for their eventual return. The mercenary will repay the guide by giving [him/her/them] a token for items which I am holding.

lines.speaker: Hiylik Myna
lines.text: I shall give such items to the guide as payment for their services once I'm handed the token.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What items will you hold?

lines.speaker: Hiylik Myna
lines.text: Oh, the range of items is very varied. Mercenaries tend to hold raw materials in high esteem and so will deposit those with me. They also seem to be good bartering items.

lines.speaker: Hiylik Myna
lines.text: Generally, things like uncooked lobsters, coal, silver bars, bow strings. Things which are useful! Plus the odd tome of experience, which are considered incredibly useful.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, thanks.

sections.title: Standard dialogue after Darkness of Hallowvale

lines.speaker: Hiylik Myna
lines.text: Hello friend. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you exchange my tokens for me?

lines.speaker: Hiylik Myna
lines.text: No need, friend. You can do that yourself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know what these nail beast nails are used for?

lines.speaker: Hiylik Myna
lines.text: Hmmm, not really sure. They do look disgusting though..oh, actually, I remember some other adventurers taking some of these to Sanfew now...something about being able to make a potion with them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, so perhaps Sanfew knows then?

lines.speaker: Hiylik Myna
lines.text: Maybe. It's worth a try. Next time you're in Taverley, pop in and ask him. I think I remember some adventurers saying something about a serum though, some sort of potion that can be made with them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me why you're here?

lines.speaker: Hiylik Myna
lines.text: Of course. These mercenaries are here waiting for someone to take them down to Burgh de Rott. They want to do their bit against the vampyres.

lines.speaker: Hiylik Myna
lines.text: I hold some items for these good hearted souls so that the guide can be recompensed when the job is done.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, thanks.

sections.title: Using nail beast nails on Hiylik

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know what these are? Or what they're used for?

lines.speaker: Hiylik Myna
lines.text: Hmmm, not really sure. They do look disgusting though..oh, actually, I remember some other adventurers taking some of these to Sanfew now...something about being able to make a potion with them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, so perhaps Sanfew knows then?

lines.speaker: Hiylik Myna
lines.text: Maybe? It's worth a try. Next time you're in Taverley, pop in and ask him. I think I remember some adventurers saying something about a serum though, some sort of potion that can be made with them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, thanks.

sections.title: Using a reward token on Hiylik

lines.speaker: Hiylik Myna
lines.text: Oh well done! Thank you for aiding our citizens.
